english_text: I feel lonely
I am all alone
Nobody understands me
I miss having someone to talk to
The house feels empty
I eat alone every day
Nobody called me today
I feel invisible
I have no one to go with
Weekends are the loneliest
I wish I had more friends
I feel disconnected from everyone
I cry when I am alone
Being alone and being lonely are different
I feel left out
Nobody notices when I am gone
Nights are the hardest
I have been feeling isolated
I want someone to hug me
I am tired of being alone
I feel like nobody cares
korean_text: 아무도 신경 안 쓰는 것 같아
romanization: amudo singyeong an sseuneun geot gata

english_text: I talk to myself sometimes
I do not fit in anywhere
I watch others having fun
I feel empty inside
Nobody knows how I really feel
I put on a brave face
Even in a crowd I feel alone
I just want someone to listen
Holiday season makes me feel lonely
I scrolled through contacts but had nobody to call
I envy people with close friends
I miss being part of a group
My heart feels heavy
I need human connection
I have no one to share this with
Some days are harder than others
I pretend I like being alone
Loneliness hits out of nowhere
I just want a warm conversation
I feel like a burden to others
It is hard to open up to people
I feel stuck in this loneliness
I wish someone would check on me
Even my own room feels foreign
I need a friend right now
I feel like I am drifting away
Loneliness can be overwhelming
But this feeling will pass
It is okay to feel lonely sometimes
Reaching out is the first step
I should be kinder to myself
You are not alone in feeling this way
I am learning to enjoy my own company
korean_text: 혼자 있는 걸 즐기는 법을 배워
romanization: honja inneun geol jeulgineun beobeul baeoeo

english_text: There are people who care about me
Tomorrow I will try reaching out
Small connections make a big difference
I deserve love and companionship
korean_text: 나도 사랑과 교류를 받을 자격이 있어
romanization: nado saranggwa gyoryureul badeul jagyeogi isseo

english_text: Loneliness teaches us to value others
I will find my people someday
